name: driver.js
when_to_use: 需要在已渲染页面上做元素聚光、滚动定位与分步讲解时用它而非手写遮罩,因为原生手写在挖洞几何、浮层避让和跨步骤焦点管理上失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能写编号说明列表;做不到随目标尺寸变化的 spotlight 挖洞、popover 自动避让、滚动定位和键盘步进状态机。

data_in.note: data_in 直接映射 driver({steps,...}) 的原生高频配置;element 字符串由上游用 document.querySelector 解析,所以目标必须在当前 document 中。

steps.element?: string CSS selector | Element —— 默认无目标,在页面中央显示浮层

popover?._default: 未提供时不显示 popover,仅聚光目标

en.when_to_use: Use it for element spotlights, scroll positioning, and step-by-step walkthroughs over an already rendered page instead of a handwritten overlay, which tends to fail at cutout geometry, popover collision avoidance, and focus management across steps.
en.why_valuable: AI defaults to a numbered instruction list. It cannot reliably create a spotlight cutout that follows target size, automatically place popovers, scroll targets into view, and manage a keyboard-steppable state machine.

data_in.note: data_in maps directly to the common native configuration for driver({steps,...}). Upstream resolves element strings with document.querySelector, so targets must be in the current document.

steps.element?: string CSS selector | Element -- no target by default; displays the popover in the center of the page

popover?._default: when omitted, no popover is shown and only the target is spotlighted
popover?.description?: string -- no body text by default

boot.widget: unsupported:driver.js v1.8.0 把 overlay 与 popover 固定写入 document.body,且 element 字符串固定走 document.querySelector;上游无 shadow 容器参数,无法满足 widget 零足迹。

example._why: step 的目标选择器与嵌套 popover 配置存在组合歧义,附最小原生配置。

carriers.widget: unsupported:上游强制 document.body/document.querySelector 全局路径,不能把 overlay、popover 与目标查询限制在 shadowRoot
carriers.codex: supported:sandbox iframe 吸收 document.body 与 document.head 全局足迹;需同源 jsDelivr ESM 与 CSS

isolation.evidence: +esm grep: `document.body` x10, `appendChild` x13, `document.querySelector` x3 — overlay SVG and popover are appended to document.body and step targets resolved via document.querySelector (can't be scoped to a shadow root). d.ts State.__events = {onKeyup,onKeydown,onResize,onScroll,onClick} confirms global keyboard/resize/scroll/click listeners (destroy() holds refs to remove them). No runtime <style> injection (relies on external driver.css). Entry correctly marks widget 'unsupported'.
